page.headline: Close more deals. Faster.
page.subheadlineTemplate: Your buyer needs pre-approval today, not next week. We pre-approve in hours, work conditions same-day, and show up at the closing table. One partnership across {stateCount} licensed states.

valueProps.headline: We close on time. We communicate weekly. We show up.
valueProps.subheadline: The five reasons local realtors send us their next pre-approval and the one after that.

items.title: 14-day average close
items.body: Our team works conditions same-day. Your closing date holds, your buyer stays calm, you keep your reputation.

items.title: In-person at every closing
items.body: Mike or your assigned LO comes to the closing table when geography allows. The deal is too important for a phone call.

items.title: Pre-approval in hours
items.body: Same-day pre-approval letters for clean files. Your buyer makes a credible offer the moment they walk out of the open house.

items.title: Co-branded marketing kits at no cost
items.body: RESPA-compliant joint flyers, open-house collateral, email blast templates. We split the marketing lift, not the disclosure.

items.title: 9 states, 22 loan officers
items.body: Cross-state buyer? We are licensed in MA, NH, ME, RI, CT, FL, CO, VT, and TX. One partnership covers your relocation pipeline.

steps.title: Refer
steps.body: Introduce your buyer or refinance client to your LMP loan officer of choice. Not sure who fits? Ask us and we will assign based on state, language, and program need.

steps.title: We work
steps.body: Pre-approval, lender shop across 30-plus wholesale lenders, document collection, conditions, underwriting. Communication stays tight with you the whole way.

steps.title: Close together
steps.body: In person at the closing table when geography allows. Both signs on the table. Your buyer remembers who showed up. So do you.

testimonials.headline: Realtors who send their next deal to LMP.

items.name: Tina C.
items.title: Realtor, Lowell MA
items.body: I send everyone I can to LMP now. Last month I had a first-time buyer with a tricky 1099 file. Aisha had the pre-approval back the same afternoon, and Mike showed up to the closing with a card for the buyer. That is the level I expect from a partner.

items.name: Mark D.
items.title: Realtor, Salem NH
items.body: Most lenders ghost you between the loan estimate and the closing disclosure. LMP sends a Friday update, every week, on every active file. I have not had a deal die at LMP in two years. That number alone is why I refer.

items.name: Hector M.
items.title: Investor agent, Houston TX
items.body: DSCR, bank-statement, multi-state buyers. Ryan McConihe knows wholesale cold and the file moves the way it should. Closed three of mine in 21 days or less last quarter. The co-branded flyers helped me run a full open-house circuit too.

coMarketing.headline: RESPA-compliant assets. Free to our partners.
coMarketing.subheadline: We share the marketing lift, never the disclosure. Every asset reviewed by our compliance partner before it hits print or pixel.

items.title: Open-house flyers
items.body: Co-branded one-pagers with your photo, your contact info, our pre-approval CTA. Print-ready PDFs, your brokerage compliance line included.

items.title: Email blast templates
items.body: New-listing announcements, just-sold updates, market-shift refinance nudges. RESPA-compliant joint marketing language reviewed by our compliance partner.

items.title: Social-ready graphics
items.body: Square and story-format Instagram and Facebook templates, swap your headshot in, post the same day. State-program callouts ready for MassHousing, NHHFA, CHFA, RIHousing, FL Hometown Heroes, TSAHC.

form.headline: Send us your next pre-approval. We will take it from there.

fields.statesHelper: Tell us where your active book is.
fields.message: Tell us about your typical buyer
fields.messagePlaceholder: First-time buyers, jumbo, investor, multi-family, relocation...

directContact.headline: Talk to us directly.
directContact.body: Mike Comerford, President & CEO, takes partner introductions personally. Reach out and we will reply same business day.

finalCta.headline: Ready to send your next pre-approval to LMP?
finalCta.bodyTemplate: One partnership. {stateCount} states. {loCount} loan officers ready to work your next file.
